title: Nucleus Software International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Nucleus Software International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Nucleus Software International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nucleus Software International Enterprises:
Nucleus Software International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software International Enterprises!
